candidates.title: `pi` can apparently no longer work with Claude subscription
candidates.body_summary: When using Claude Pro subscription, pi receives a 400 error saying third-party apps now draw from extra usage instead of plan limits.

candidates.title: Extension widgets reorder/flicker when frequently updated
candidates.body_summary: Two concurrent above-editor extension widgets flicker and swap vertical order when both update via ctx.ui.setWidget() on a timer.

candidates.title: Using shabang (`!`) to run commands causing command not found
candidates.body_summary: When using zsh with plugins, running git plugin commands via `!` in pi says command not found because it defaults to /bin/bash.

candidates.title: Links not clickable anymore
candidates.body_summary: After recent update, hyperlinks are not clickable anymore in pi.

candidates.title: 你们程序员拿 Kimi 写过哪怕一行代码吗？
candidates.body_summary: User complaint about Kimi agent capabilities and skill/tool calling issues.

candidates.title: docs: publish canonical API reference for /anthropic/v1/messages compatibility endpoint
candidates.body_summary: Request to publish canonical API reference docs for the Anthropic-compatible endpoint so agentic-tool builders can pin against a stable contract.

candidates.title: docs: publish canonical API reference for /anthropic/v1/messages compatibility endpoint
candidates.body_summary: Request to publish canonical API reference docs for the Anthropic-compatible endpoint.

candidates.title: when to release M2.5
candidates.body_summary: User asking about release timeline for M2.5.

candidates.title: MiniMax M2.1 在上下文中丢失标签
candidates.body_summary: MiniMax M2.1 loses tags in context, causing vllm deployment to fail parsing tool calls when thinking chain is abnormal.

candidates.title: MiniMax M2.5 rejects Claude Code background structured-output requests (HTTP 400 invalid params)
candidates.body_summary: minimax-m2.5 returns HTTP 400 for Claude Code background structured-output requests. The API does not fully support recent Claude Code request formats.

candidates.title: Incompatibility error in compute capability 8.0
candidates.body_summary: A100 GPU prompts incompatibility error during runtime: ValueError type fp8e4nv not supported in this architecture.

candidates.title: API Error: terminated constantly happens
candidates.body_summary: Claude Code combined with minimax 2.5 causes constant terminated errors.

candidates.title: Minimax 2.5 creates inexplicable spaces in file paths when used in agents
candidates.body_summary: After a while, the model starts inserting spaces into output text, particularly in file paths.

candidates.title: Cannot work with OpenAi compatible format
candidates.body_summary: Missing /model list endpoint making it incompatible with OpenAI-compatible tools.

candidates.title: GLM-5.1 fails to understand tool_reference response type in Anthropic-compatible tool use
candidates.body_summary: GLM-5.1 receives a tool_reference content block but fails to interpret its meaning, concluding that no tools were found.

candidates.title: GLM-5.1 fails to understand tool_reference response type in Anthropic-compatible tool use
candidates.body_summary: GLM-5.1 receives a tool_reference content block but fails to interpret its meaning, concluding that no tools were found.

candidates.title: Establish Official GitHub Bot & Email for GLM Co-authorship in Open-Source Projects
candidates.body_summary: Request to register an official noreply email and create a GitHub Bot account for GLM co-authorship attribution.

candidates.title: Proposal: FIM-guided adaptive LoRA rank allocation (FimConfig + initialize_lora_fim_ranks)
candidates.body_summary: Proposal to add FIM-guided adaptive LoRA rank allocation as a new init_lora_weights mode using empirical Fisher Information Matrix.

candidates.title: LoraConfig(bias='lora_only') correctly marks bias trainable but get_peft_model_state_dict and save_pretrained do not include it
candidates.body_summary: LoraConfig with bias='lora_only' marks base layer bias as trainable, but state dict and save_pretrained do not include it, causing reload to not reproduce trained output.

candidates.title: BUG: on_bad_lines=callable does not invoke callable for all bad lines
candidates.body_summary: When using on_bad_lines=callable with engine='python', the callable is not invoked for all bad lines in CSV parsing.

candidates.title: Performance regression in searchsorted for string Series from pandas 2.2.2 to 3.0.3
candidates.body_summary: searchsorted on a large string Series changed from less than 0.0001s to 1.3279s between pandas 2.2.2 and 3.0.3.

candidates.title: Feature Request: Use FunASR for training data annotation
candidates.body_summary: Request to use FunASR for automatic speech-to-text annotation to help with training data preparation.

candidates.title: Cannot run on RTX 4090 with CUDA 13.2
candidates.body_summary: Model tries to load into RAM instead of VRAM, resulting in OOM crash on RTX 4090 with CUDA 13.2.

candidates.title: Feature Request: OpenAI-compatible TTS endpoint for cloud API (api.fish.audio)
candidates.body_summary: Request to add an OpenAI-compatible TTS endpoint to the Fish Audio cloud API for integration with OpenClaw and other applications.

candidates.title: [BUG]: vertical_spacing argument for make_subplots should leave space for subplot titles
candidates.body_summary: Setting vertical_spacing to a small value while passing subplot_titles results in overlapping titles and subplots.

candidates.title: Request: add type hints and py.typed for type checkers and tab complete
candidates.body_summary: Request to add type hints and a py.typed file so type checkers like mypy can use them.

candidates.title: [BUG]: error_y.array renders error bars before initial render but not after Plotly.restyle
candidates.body_summary: A scatter trace renders error_y.array differently depending on when the property is applied - visible before first render but not after restyle.

candidates.title: StackdriverRemoteLogIO: three bugs in AF3 supervisor context — empty labels, broken read filter, unguarded send crash
candidates.body_summary: Three bugs in StackdriverRemoteLogIO when running in Airflow 3 supervisor context: empty labels, broken read filter, and unguarded send crash.

candidates.title: Dag version: Graph view is not updated correctly when user switches versions from the drop-down
candidates.body_summary: When switching dag versions in graph view, the graph is not updated correctly.

candidates.title: add ti.partition_date and ti.partition_key to ti Context variables
candidates.body_summary: Request to add ti.partition_date and ti.partition_key to template variables for asset-based dags.

candidates.title: Review & update Kedro deployment docs for AWS Step Functions
candidates.body_summary: Review existing Kedro deployment documentation for AWS Step Functions to confirm accuracy and update if needed.

candidates.title: [docs]: Remove stale modules reference from generated Sphinx docs template and clarify API docs workflow
candidates.body_summary: Generated Sphinx docs template contains a stale modules entry that does not exist. Should remove the reference and clarify manual sphinx-apidoc workflow.

candidates.title: [Doc] Streamline and simplify Kedro doc for smoother onboarding
candidates.body_summary: Onboarding sections are lengthy and exhaustive. Should refine the flow to be more streamlined and visually guided.

candidates.title: Add exclude_pipelines parameter to find_pipelines
candidates.body_summary: Request to add exclude_pipelines parameter to find_pipelines to allow skipping broken pipelines from autodiscovery.

candidates.title: Review & update Kedro deployment docs for AWS EMR Serverless
candidates.body_summary: Review Kedro deployment documentation for AWS EMR Serverless to confirm accuracy with latest platform behavior.

candidates.title: Question: Reporting security issues through Huntr
candidates.body_summary: Five security PRs have been merged but need validation through Huntr before the platform sunsets on July 31, 2026.

candidates.title: Several recent PRs required security review and fixes after merge (esp. #3477, #3498)
candidates.body_summary: Several recent PRs were merged with unaddressed Copilot review concerns, leaving security issues and regressions.

candidates.title: Max depth of the all wordnet POS should be returned and kept as static
candidates.body_summary: _compute_max_depth() returns None regardless of POS. Should expose as public function and keep max_depth as static value.

candidates.title: [idea] extend attributes of RFECV to indicate order of feature elimination
candidates.body_summary: RFECV provides scores for reduced feature subsets but does not expose which feature was eliminated at each step.

candidates.title: ExtraTree*.fit docstring is the DecisionTree*.fit docstring
candidates.body_summary: The docstring for ExtraTree*.fit is the same as DecisionTree*.fit, which is inaccurate.

candidates.title: Using dask distributed with a pipeline and column_transformer breaks metadata routing
candidates.body_summary: Using a pipeline with ColumnTransformer in a distributed dask environment raises AttributeError: 'dict' object has no attribute 'transform'.

candidates.title: @mlflow/vercel package root points to missing dist/index.js
candidates.body_summary: npm package publishes main: dist/index.js but the file is not included in the package, causing import failures.

candidates.title: mlflow.transformers.persist_pretrained_model silently corrupts state_dict keys for PEFT/LoRA models
candidates.body_summary: persist_pretrained_model writes LoRA-wrapped state_dict keys instead of flat keys, causing reload to produce randomly reinitialized weights.

candidates.title: TD3Params policy_noise docstring
candidates.body_summary: The docstring for policy_noise says higher values increase exploration, which is misleading. Should say it helps address function approximation error.

candidates.title: Angle brackets in regular expressions are not escaped when rendering data docs
candidates.body_summary: When angle brackets are used in regex for ExpectColumnValuesToMatchRegex, they are passed directly into HTML and ignored by the browser.

candidates.title: [BUG] row_condition
candidates.body_summary: No matter how row_condition is written, it always produces an error in Databricks with pyspark.
